_comment: Release verification policy for cilock binaries. The policy itself is committed unsigned here so reviewers can read it; the release workflow signs it (DSSE) at publish time and ships the signed copy as release-v1.policy.json. Users verify cilock binaries against the signed copy hosted at https://cilock.aflock.ai/policy/release-v1.policy.json.
name: cilock-release-v1

sigstore-fulcio._comment: Public Sigstore Fulcio root, used to verify the keyless cosign signature on the binary tarball, .sig, and .cert that ship with every release.

release-build.name: release-build
release-build._comment: Built and signed in .github/workflows/release.yml. Identity is the GH Actions OIDC workflow identity, which Fulcio binds to the cosign cert.
